items.title: 1 Warren Buffett Stock to Hold Forever
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Warren Buffett is a big fan of Coca-Cola, which he has held in Berkshire Hathaway's portfolio for decades. Coca-Cola is a Dividend King with a strong brand, pricing power, and global reach, making it an attractive long-term investment for Buffett and other investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Coca-Cola's strong brand, pricing power, global reach, and status as a Dividend King, making it an attractive long-term investment for Warren Buffett and other investors. The article also notes that Coca-Cola has been a key holding in Berkshire Hathaway's portfolio for decades.
The article does not mention Procter & Gamble, so no sentiment can be determined.
The article states that American Express is one of the three stocks that Warren Buffett does not plan to ever sell, indicating a positive sentiment towards the company.
The article states that Apple is one of the three stocks that Warren Buffett does not plan to ever sell, indicating a positive sentiment towards the company.
